title: GabCraft19's Medieval Longswords
description: With this mod you have Longswords in Minecraft.
body:
# GabCraft19's Medieval Longswords  

## Description:  

GabCraft19's Medieval Longswords is a weaponry mod that introduces a collection of longswords inspired by medieval designs, providing players with powerful and visually striking tools for combat. These swords are perfect for those who seek a balance between damage, durability, and style in their Minecraft adventures.  

This mod is designed to stand alone but also lays the foundation for future additions to the GabCraft19 mod series, ensuring compatibility and seamless gameplay integration.  

## Features:  

- **Unique Longswords**: Adds a variety of medieval-inspired longswords, each crafted with distinct materials and stats to suit different combat strategies.  
- **Balanced Mechanics**: Offers a mix of high damage and durability without overpowering the core Minecraft experience.  
- **Future Expandability**: Part of the GabCraft19 series, this mod will integrate seamlessly with upcoming mods to enhance your gameplay further.  

Wield the power of medieval craftsmanship and dominate your battles with these finely crafted longswords.  

**Found a bug or have feedback?** Join my **Discord server** to report issues for free. Your support helps keep my mods alive and growing. Thank you for being part of the journey!
